plugins.name: wzrdx-kb
plugins.notes: KB-first doctrine. Installed and registered by `wzrdx setup`.

plugins.name: company-profile
plugins.notes: Company base context. Ships with the `wzrdx company` command.

plugins.name: data
plugins.notes: People analytics (turnover, headcount). Shared with ops and marketing.

plugins.name: claude-skills
plugins.notes: MIT, 338 skills. Cherry-pick the C-level advisory (66 incl. CHRO), org design and compliance subsets. Vet before each adoption.

plugins.name: hr-skills
plugins.notes: MIT, dedicated HR/TA skills incl. technical recruiting per role. Small but active; vet and adopt selectively.

plugins.name: jobpilot
plugins.notes: Candidate-side job-application automation, not a recruiter tool. Does not fit CHRO.
